description_long: This is a modern, two-story house with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The facade features large, symmetrical windows that allow ample natural light into the interior spaces. The main entrance is centrally located, flanked by double doors and a paved walkway leading up to it, bordered by green lawns on either side. The exterior walls are finished in a smooth, white material, giving the house a minimalist and contemporary appearance. The rear and side views reveal additional windows and a variety of room layouts, with some interior walls painted in muted colors. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and open, airy interiors.
description: A modern, two-story house with a flat roof, large symmetrical windows, and a minimalist white exterior. The central entryway is flanked by green lawns and a paved walkway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance with double doors, large symmetrical windows, and green lawns on both sides of the walkway.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the plain white wall with a single window and glimpses of colored interior walls.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying more large windows and the open, airy layout of the interior rooms.
description_view_3: Right side view with a mostly solid white wall, a single window, and the continuation of the green lawn and walkway.
attribute_entryway_design: Central double doors with a paved walkway, no porch or overhang, minimalist design
